summary: Tested complete contract signing flow for True Joy Birthing. All features working correctly - contract displays provider/client info, fee summary, full agreement text, provider signature, and signing form. Contract signing API works and updates status to 'Signed'.

contract_display.provider_name: PASS - Shows 'Sarah Mitchell' with 'Peaceful Beginnings Doula Services'
contract_display.full_agreement: PASS - Full Agreement section with complete contract text displayed
contract_display.provider_signature: PASS - Shows 'Provider Signature: Sarah Mitchell signed on February 20, 2026'

signature_form.name_label: PASS - 'Your Full Legal Name *' label visible
signature_form.agreement_checkbox: PASS - Checkbox text visible: 'I have read the entire agreement...'
signature_form.sign_button: PASS - Sign Contract button found with data-testid='sign-contract-btn'

signing_flow.status_update: PASS - Contract status changes from 'Sent' to 'Signed'
signing_flow.client_signature_stored: PASS - Client signature stored with signer_name, signature_data, signed_at
signing_flow.email_notification: PASS - API returns emails_sent: {doula: true, client: true}
signing_flow.signed_confirmation: PASS - 'Contract Signed' confirmation card displayed after signing

verified_features: Contract loads with all details (provider, client, due date)
Fee summary displays Total Fee, Retainer, and Remaining Balance correctly
Full Agreement section shows complete contract text
Signature form with name input and agreement checkbox
Signing API works and updates contract status
Signed confirmation displayed after successful signing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract signing flow fully tested and working. Contract contract_6cc57257d974 is now in 'Signed' status with Emma Johnson's signature. The page correctly shows the signed confirmation after signing. Note: React Native TouchableOpacity checkbox requires JavaScript click workaround on web.
notes: UI button clicks for React Native TouchableOpacity components require JavaScript evaluate workaround on web - standard Playwright clicks may not trigger events properly.
